items.title: Why Johnson & Johnson Could Be the Ultimate Dividend King
items.description: Johnson & Johnson has increased its dividend every year for 63 consecutive years. It doesn't want to stop.

items.title: Is There Still Room for Growth in J&J Shares After Recent FDA Approval?
items.description: Trying to figure out whether to hold, buy, or trim your Johnson & Johnson position? You are definitely not alone. This blue chip stock has a long history of resilience, but recent price movements have caused both excitement and caution among investors. Over just the past week, shares have climbed 2.0%, building on steady gains that have pushed the stock up 1.4% over the last month. More impressively, year-to-date, Johnson & Johnson has surged 24.8%. Many longtime holders are pleased with a...

items.title: Best Dividend Aristocrats For October 2025
items.description: Dividend Aristocrats, tracked by NOBL, outperformed SPY in August but lagged year-to-date. Check out the promising dividend aristocrats right now.

items.title: Is Palantir Technologies Stock a Buy Now?
items.author: Patrick Sanders
items.description: Palantir Technologies is experiencing significant growth with strong government and commercial revenue, but faces skepticism due to its high valuation metrics. The company's Artificial Intelligence Platform (AIP) is driving expansion, with 50% projected quarterly growth and impressive deal closures.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong revenue growth (93% commercial, 53% government), expanding market cap, innovative AI platform, and potential for transformative business operations
Used as a comparative benchmark for valuation metrics, no direct analysis of performance
